patterns.notes: London extended beyond Asia range (London Breakout). London and US moved in opposite directions (Whipsaw). London broke Asia low and US continued lower (London Continuation). ORB 30m confirmed bearish. ORB 60m confirmed bearish. VWAP bearish reclaim/reject.

bias.explanation: Daily Bias is Bullish based on previous day (Bearish), Asia (Bullish), and London (Bullish) with bayesian equal-weight update. US Open Bias is Bullish (30m) / Bullish (60m). Overnight range position is Inside. Gap is small down. HTF slope bias is n/a. Day type is Normal. Regime is MeanRevert / HMM Mixed. Event risk is none. Volatility regime is 'compressed', momentum and ROC aligned at 0.001, RVOL at 0.32. Kalman slope at -1.4387. Bayes prob 0.56 from equal weights. News tone is neutral and only adjusts confidence, not direction. Day impact: Session weighting favors larger-range sessions over quieter ones. ATR-scaled thresholds reduce false bias on quiet days. US open inside overnight range favors mean reversion early. Mean-revert regime: fade risk higher on extremes. Price stretched far from anchored VWAP: mean-revert risk higher. Premarket bias (09:10 ET) uses overnight range, gap, VWAP, and premarket trend. AMD signal favors bullish distribution; London close outsidehigh. Daily bias confirmed after 10:45 ET by 60m OR (bearish).
bias.vwap_comment: Price is below both daily and weekly VWAP (strong bearish posture). Suggestion: If price opens below daily VWAP, then a retracement up to daily VWAP is the first check; if it rejects, then continuation can push away from weekly VWAP resistance. If price opens above daily VWAP, then expect a deeper pullback toward weekly VWAP.
bias.news_comment: ForexFactory: neutral (No major high-impact events dominating today's tone.) | SeekingAlpha: neutral (Macro commentary is mixed; no strong risk-on/off consensus.). News tone adjusts bias confidence but does not override session structure.

trade_suggestion.rationale: Daily Bias and US Open Bias are both Bullish, but confidence is moderate (0.60). There is some edge, but mixed conditions suggest reduced size.

accuracy.explanation: Daily Bias was Bullish, but the market closed Bearish. The bias did not match the actual outcome; review session structure, VWAP posture, and news context for this day.
